label: Datadog
description: Connect to Datadog to query metrics, logs, traces, and events from your observability platform.

form.title: Connect Datadog
form.subtitle: Paste your Datadog API key and Application key to give Anton access to your observability data.

methods.label: API Key + Application Key
methods.description: Paste your Datadog API key and Application key. Quickest setup — no OAuth flow required. Scoped to the permissions of the user or service account that owns the Application key.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with API Key + Application Key

Datadog uses two credentials together: an **API key** (identifies your org) and an **Application key** (identifies the actor and carries permissions).

### Find your API key

1. Log in to Datadog and go to **Organization Settings → API Keys** (or visit `https://app.datadoghq.com/organization-settings/api-keys`).
2. Click **New Key** or copy an existing key you want Anton to use.
3. Give it a descriptive name like `Anton`.

### Find or create your Application key

1. Go to **Organization Settings → Application Keys** (or `https://app.datadoghq.com/organization-settings/application-keys`).
2. Click **New Key**, name it `Anton`, and copy the value immediately — it is shown only once.
3. Scope the key to the minimum permissions Anton needs (e.g. `metrics_read`, `logs_read`).

### Select your region

Choose the Datadog site that matches your account sign-in URL:
- **US1** → `app.datadoghq.com` (default)
- **US3** → `us3.datadoghq.com`
- **US5** → `us5.datadoghq.com`
- **EU** → `app.datadoghq.eu`
- **US1-FED** → `app.ddog-gov.com`

### Notes

- Application keys are shown only once at creation. If lost, delete the old key and create a new one.
- API keys are org-level; Application keys carry per-user permissions — use a service account for production.
- Rotate both keys in Organization Settings if you suspect exposure.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found under Organization Settings → API Keys. Identifies your Datadog organization.

fields.name: application_key
fields.label: Application Key
